description: Connector trait split — discovery vs runtime: new `ConnectorDiscovery` and `ConnectorRuntime` reference interfaces (JSDoc contracts, not base classes — avoids collision with existing `AgentRegistry` subagent tracker). Discovery stubs (`listModels`, `supportsModel`, `loadHistory`) added to `AgentConnector` base; three concrete connectors annotated with `// ── Discovery ──` / `// ── Runtime ──` section comments. 18-test shape compliance suite.
